company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Office Properties

supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on construction contractors, suppliers for building materials, labor availability for property development and maintenance
risks: Supply chain disruptions and labor shortages causing delays in completion of development and redevelopment projects; increased costs to maintain, renovate and develop properties related to inflation

regulatory_risks: Tax law changes affecting REIT status
ADA compliance requirements
Changes in federal, state and local laws and regulations
Compliance with Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) requirements regarding Prohibited Persons
Climate change regulatory efforts and legislation requiring increased environmental disclosures and reporting
Failure to qualify as a REIT would cause BXP to be taxed as a corporation, substantially reducing funds available for payment of dividends
Changes in accounting pronouncements by FASB and SEC could adversely affect reported financial performance
Climate change regulations and disclosure requirements
Compliance with Americans with Disabilities Act and other safety regulations could result in substantial costs
Labor and employment laws
Federal, state and local laws and regulations related to real property, zoning, usage, building, fire and life safety codes
Building codes and safety regulations
Environmental laws governing asbestos, hazardous substances, and contamination requiring investigation, cleanup, and remediation costs
Potential changes to U.S. federal tax laws by new presidential administration
Environmental regulations and compliance costs
Federal securities laws and regulations and stock exchange requirements
Data privacy and cybersecurity regulations
Changes in rent control or rent stabilization and eviction laws in markets could adversely affect residential portfolio
Zoning and land use regulations
Possible adverse state and local tax audits and changes in state and local tax laws could result in increased tax costs
Securities regulations and reporting requirements

sanction_risks: OFAC Requirements prohibit conducting business with Prohibited Persons designated as terrorists or otherwise blocked/banned
